content: BrasilAPI: CORS-enabled, 100% reliability over 30-day monitor, avg 256ms response, free, no API key, open-source. Docs at brasilapi.com.br/docs. No explicit rate limit published but asks users not to abuse. OpenCNPJ: hosted on Cloudflare CDN, responses in ~50ms cached, rate limit 50 req/s per IP, 24/7 high availability, no API key. Both provide CNPJ lookup with CORS; BrasilAPI is the safer primary choice for MVP due to transparent SLA monitoring and institutional backing.
